examples: She always has cravings for chocolate.
I've been craving Korean food all week.
context: Since I'm already outside I decided to go for a little walk. Usually I try to walk 10,000 steps per day but on the weekends I'm not too strict about it. When I walk I usually listen to music or call my family on the phone. I've worked up in appetite and I'm craving Korean food. So I'm going to treat myself and order some delivery food for dinner. I'm a big fan of Kongguksoo and since it's only seasonal I try to eat it as much as possible in the summer. So I think that's what I'm going to order tonight. I think I deserve a beer tonight. Kimchi, Kongguksoo, mandu, in one beer. Perfect. My food just arrived and I can tell that I was so hungry when I ordered.

examples: The cake has a soft, fluffy texture.
I love the crunchy texture of fried chicken.
The texture of this fabric is so smooth.
context: I love the texture of it. With the crunchy vegetables in the soft tofu.
